title: Sequoia
director: Chester M. Franklin, Edwin L. Marin
writer: Ann Cunningham, Sam Armstrong, Carey Wilson
actors: Jean Parker, Russell Hardie, Samuel S. Hinds
plot: Toni lives with her father, writer Matthew Martin, in the Sequoia forests of California. While walking, she finds and brings home, a small puma which she calls 'Gato' and a young fawn, called 'Malibu'. The three become friends whi...
